gui.camera_lockon.button.presets.tooltip: Save, load, update, delete, import, or share configuration presets. Presets do nothing until loaded.
gui.camera_lockon.reset.title: Reset Camera Lock-On settings?
gui.camera_lockon.reset.description: Blacklist, history, entity aim overrides, and manual AOE weapons are preserved.
gui.camera_lockon.tab.camera.tooltip: Steering, dead zone, and suspension settings.
gui.camera_lockon.tab.filter.tooltip: Entity selection, target priority, blacklist, and per-entity aim points.
gui.camera_lockon.tab.hud.tooltip: Target mini HUD appearance and position.
gui.camera_lockon.tab.group.tooltip: Experimental sweep and AOE group aiming.
gui.camera_lockon.main.smart_lock.toolti: Prioritizes direct mouse input, then gently returns to the target.
gui.camera_lockon.main.hostile_only.tool: Ignore passive entities unless explicitly selected or pinned.
gui.camera_lockon.main.aim.tooltip: Global fallback aim height. Per-entity overrides have priority.
gui.camera_lockon.main.edit_global_aim.t: Edit the fallback point used when no entity override exists.
gui.camera_lockon.main.color.tooltip: Used by both the reticle and Auto Lock acquisition box.
gui.camera_lockon.main.lock_sounds.toolt: Play feedback when locking, switching, pinning, or unlocking.
gui.camera_lockon.camera.dead_zone.toolt: Softens small return corrections; Smart Lock still owns mouse-input priority.
gui.camera_lockon.camera.mining.tooltip: Pause camera steering while breaking blocks.
gui.camera_lockon.camera.using_item.tool: Pause camera steering while eating, drinking, blocking, charging, or using an item.
gui.camera_lockon.camera.riding.tooltip: Pause camera steering while mounted on an entity.
gui.camera_lockon.camera.elytra.tooltip: Pause camera steering while fall-flying with an elytra.
gui.camera_lockon.auto.auto_lock.tooltip: Acquire a target after looking at its hitbox briefly.
gui.camera_lockon.auto.auto_retarget.too: Find another valid target when the current one is lost.
gui.camera_lockon.auto.pixel_indicator.t: Show one shrinking pixel box while acquiring.
gui.camera_lockon.auto.switch.tooltip: Smart selects the best nearby target. Cycle visits valid visible targets in a stable clockwise order.
gui.camera_lockon.auto.lock_on_hit.toolt: Off, acquire only when unlocked, or always switch to the entity you hit.
gui.camera_lockon.auto.temporary_pin.too: Controls whether the pinned type is strict or only preferred.
gui.camera_lockon.filter.type_filter.too: Any entity, selected type only, or prefer the selected type.
gui.camera_lockon.filter.selected_entity: Search all registered vanilla and modded living entities.
gui.camera_lockon.filter.target_priority: Balanced combines crosshair alignment and distance. Other modes favor crosshair, nearest target, lowest health, or highest health.
gui.camera_lockon.filter.retarget_rule.t: Same Type Only is recommended when farming one mob species.
gui.camera_lockon.filter.blacklist.toolt: Entities in this list can never be locked.
gui.camera_lockon.filter.aim_overrides.t: Manage exact saved aim points for individual entity types.
gui.camera_lockon.filter.prefer_bosses.t: Give configured bosses a targeting score bonus.
gui.camera_lockon.filter.show_registry_i: Show technical registry IDs where useful.
gui.camera_lockon.hud.hud_enabled.toolti: Show combat information for the locked target.
gui.camera_lockon.hud.damage_flash.toolt: Blink vanilla heart containers when health is lost.
gui.camera_lockon.hud.name: Name
gui.camera_lockon.hud.health.tooltip: Show vanilla hearts or compact numeric health.
gui.camera_lockon.hud.armor_points.toolt: Show vanilla armor sprites or a compact numeric value.
gui.camera_lockon.threat.indicators.tool: Warn about recent attackers outside your view.
gui.camera_lockon.threat.group_side.tool: Combine nearby threats on the same screen side.
gui.camera_lockon.threat.response.toolti: Indicator only, lock after repeated hits, or lock immediately.
Allow a new attacker to steal an existing lock.
gui.camera_lockon.group.group_aim.toolti: Shift the effective point toward a nearby target cluster.
gui.camera_lockon.group.same_type_only.t: Only include entities matching the primary type.
gui.camera_lockon.group.activation.toolt: Use recognized sweep weapons or keep Group Aim active with every held item.
gui.camera_lockon.group.manual_aoe_weapo: Add modded AOE weapons that do not expose NeoForge SWORD_SWEEP.
gui.camera_lockon.selector.title: Select Living Entity
gui.camera_lockon.selector.select.toolti: Use the highlighted entity. Double-clicking a list entry does the same.
gui.camera_lockon.selector.add.tooltip: Add the highlighted entity and keep this list open for more selections.
gui.camera_lockon.enum.aim_preset.head: Head
